overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rainy neon-lit city street. The player passes a pawnshop, steam vents, and various storefronts including a noodle bar.

events.description: player moves past the pawnshop and turns right onto the main street

agents.ego_description: standing near the pawnshop then walking past it onto the wet street

notable_agents.action: woman with dark hair standing at the pawnshop counter
woman with blonde hair standing at the pawnshop counter

entered.detail: yellow and teal kiosk with metal security grating and illuminated interior
tall concrete wall separating sidewalk from lower street area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a pawnshop kiosk with two women standing at the counter. The player stands briefly before walking past the shop, moving under the teal awning with the illuminated 'PAWNSHOP' sign visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city sidewalk with neon billboards and steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet sidewalk past palm trees and steam vents

entered.detail: orange and gray tiled sidewalk reflecting neon lights and rain
palm tree in concrete planter on sidewalk edge
large vertical billboard with pink neon advertisement featuring a woman's face
steam rising from street vents creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: Walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk, the player moves past palm trees and concrete barriers. Steam rises from street vents while neon billboards glow in the distance, reflecting off the wet pavement tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner store intersection with pedestrian traffic

events.description: pedestrian with umbrella crosses the sidewalk in front of the player

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching a corner store with an open sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a black umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with flat roof and illuminated signage
red and blue neon 'OPEN' sign on building facade
elevated pedestrian bridge or monorail track structure above the street

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a corner store with a glowing 'OPEN' sign while an elevated walkway looms overhead. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks past in the opposite direction as the player continues along the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air noodle bar with seated customers

events.description: approaching the noodle bar with customers seated at the counter

agents.ego_description: walking past the noodle bar where customers are seated on green stools eating

notable_agents.action: customer sitting at the noodle bar counter on a green stool

entered.detail: open-air food stall with counter, green bar stools, and illuminated menu
illuminated sign with Asian characters above the food stall
closed metal security shutters on storefront adjacent to the noodle bar

segments.scene_description: The player approaches an open-air noodle bar where customers sit on green stools beneath a glowing sign. The scene features closed metal shutters on adjacent storefronts as the player walks past the food stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy, neon-lit city street that transitions from a quiet commercial kiosk to a bustling open-air food stall. It begins at a pawnshop where two women stand at a counter, moving beneath a teal awning and an illuminated sign. As the camera advances along the rain-slicked sidewalk, the environment shifts to a stretch of concrete barriers and palm trees where steam rises from street vents and neon billboards reflect off the wet pavement. The scene then opens up toward a corner store with a glowing open sign beneath a looming elevated walkway, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella. Finally, the movement leads toward an open-air noodle bar with customers on green stools, gliding past closed metal shutters as the journey concludes at the glowing food stall.
